login.title: Ku soo gal HantiFlow Pro
login.subtitle: Geli xogta aad ku gasho akoonkaaga.

register.title: Samee akoonkaaga
register.subtitle: Isdiiwaangeli si aad ula bilowdo iibsiga HantiFlow Pro.
register.usernameHint: Waxay kuu ogolaanaysaa inaad ku gasho magaca isticmaale halkii aad iimaylka isticmaali lahayd.

users.title: Isticmaalayaasha
users.subtitle: Maamul akoonnada shaqaalaha, alaab-qeybiyeyaasha, iyo darawalka.
users.resetPassword: Dib u deji furaha sirta ah

toasts.passwordReset: Furaha sirta ah waa la dib-u-dejiyay

deleteDialog.title: Tirtir akoonka isticmaale
deleteDialog.body: Tani waxay si joogto ah u tirtiri doontaa {{name}} ({{email}}). Lamana soo celin karo.

resetPasswordDialog.title: Dib u deji furaha sirta ah
resetPasswordDialog.placeholder: Furaha sirta ah ee cusub (ugu yaraan 8 xaraf)
resetPasswordDialog.confirmButton: Dib u deji furaha sirta ah

viewDialog.title: Faahfaahinta isticmaalaha
viewDialog.lastKnownLocation: Goobtii ugu dambeysay ee la ogaaday

createUserDialog.title: Samee akoon shaqaale, alaab-qeybiye, ama darawal
createUserDialog.description: Macaamiisha way isdiiwaangeliyaan. Tan u isticmaal akoonnada aad si toos ah u sameyso.
createUserDialog.passwordLabel: Furaha sirta ah ee ku meel gaarka ah
